title: About EduDhruv
content:
Helping Indian Students Make Confident Study Abroad Decisions

EduDhruv was founded by a group of like-minded education professionals, study abroad consultants, and former international students who shared one frustration — the lack of honest, India-specific information for students planning to study abroad.

We know how overwhelming the journey can be. Choosing the right university, understanding real fees in Indian Rupees, finding an education loan without collateral, navigating visa requirements, securing a scholarship — there is so much to figure out, and most information online is either too generic, outdated, or written for a Western audience.

EduDhruv is built specifically for Indian students and their families.

Who We Are

Our team brings together professionals across education consulting, financial advisory, immigration guidance, and student support — all with personal or professional experience navigating the study abroad journey from India.

Some of us studied abroad ourselves. Some of us have helped hundreds of Indian families navigate university applications, education loan approvals, and visa processes. All of us believe that access to clear, honest, and practical information should be free — not locked behind a consultation fee.

We are based across India, the UAE, the UK, and Canada — giving us ground-level knowledge of the destinations Indian students care most about.

What We Cover

EduDhruv publishes in-depth, regularly updated guides across six areas that matter most to Indian students:

  • Top Universities — Honest guides to the world's best universities with real fees in Indian Rupees, admission requirements, Indian student numbers, and scholarship opportunities
  • Education Loans — Detailed comparisons of SBI Scholar Loan, HDFC Credila, Prodigy Finance, MPOWER, Avanse and Auxilo — with real interest rates, collateral requirements and EMI calculations
  • Scholarships — Complete application guides for Chevening, Fulbright, Commonwealth, DAAD, Gates Cambridge and more — with eligibility, deadlines and practical tips
  • Indian Students Abroad — Country-specific guides for students going to UK, Canada, Australia, USA, Germany, Singapore, Ireland and Dubai — with costs in INR, visa requirements and Indian community information
  • Student Accommodation — Neighbourhood guides, average rents and booking tips for London, Toronto, Melbourne, Sydney, Singapore and Berlin
  • Travel Essentials — Step-by-step visa guides, travel insurance advice and post-study work visa information

Our Editorial Standards

All information published on EduDhruv is:

  • Researched using official university websites, government immigration portals, and lender documentation
  • Updated regularly to reflect the latest fees, deadlines and policy changes
  • Written to be genuinely useful to Indian students and families — not to sell products
  • Reviewed by our editorial team before publication

Where we use affiliate links or advertising, this is clearly disclosed. Our editorial content is never influenced by commercial relationships.

Our Promise

We will never recommend a university, loan, or scholarship that we would not recommend to our own family members. Every guide we publish is written with one question in mind: "Would this actually help an Indian student make a better decision?"

If you have a question our guides don't answer, or spot anything that needs updating, we want to hear from you.

Get in Touch

General enquiries: edudruv@gmail.com
Website: https://www.edudhruv.com

For personalised education loan guidance, visit our free Loan Portal: https://www.edudhruv.com/loan-portal/

Disclaimer

EduDhruv.com participates in affiliate marketing programs. Some links on our site are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a small commission if you click and make a purchase — at no extra cost to you. This helps us keep the site free and running. We only recommend services we believe are genuinely useful for students.

Contact us: edudruv@gmail.com

title: Privacy Policy
content:
Last updated: April 2026

EduDhruv (“we”, “us”, “our”) operates the website https://www.edudhruv.com. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data when you use our website.

Information We Collect

We collect several types of information for various purposes to provide and improve our service:

  • Usage data — IP address, browser type, pages visited, time spent on pages
  • Cookies — small files stored on your device to track preferences and improve experience
  • Contact information — name and email address if you submit our contact form

Cookies

We use cookies for analytics (Google Analytics) and advertising purposes. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent.

Third-Party Services

We use the following third-party services which may collect data:

  • Google Analytics — website traffic analysis
  • Google AdSense — display advertising
  • Affiliate programmes — we participate in affiliate marketing programmes including CJ Affiliate, Coursera, and others. When you click an affiliate link and make a purchase, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you.
  • Unsplash — photography

Affiliate Disclosure

EduDhruv.com is a participant in affiliate marketing programmes. Links marked with “→” or labelled as “Helpful Resources” may be affiliate links. We only recommend products and services we believe provide genuine value to students.

Data Retention

We retain personal data only for as long as necessary to provide our services and comply with legal obligations.

Your Rights

You have the right to access, correct, or delete any personal data we hold about you. Contact us at edudruv@gmail.com to exercise these rights.

Children's Privacy

Our website is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 13.

Changes to This Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated date.

Contact Us

If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at: edudruv@gmail.com

title: Contact Us
content:
We'd love to hear from you!

Whether you have a question about our content, want to discuss a partnership or sponsorship, or simply want to get in touch — we're here.

Get In Touch

Email: edudruv@gmail.com

Website: https://www.edudhruv.com

Response time: We aim to respond to all enquiries within 48 hours.

For Advertisers & Partners

Interested in reaching our audience of international students and education seekers? We offer:

  • Sponsored content opportunities
  • Affiliate partnerships
  • Display advertising
  • Newsletter mentions

Please email edudruv@gmail.com with the subject line “Partnership Enquiry” and we will get back to you promptly.

For Students

Have a question about universities, scholarships, loans, accommodation, or student travel? Browse our categories or send us your question and we'll do our best to point you in the right direction.

title: Terms and Conditions
content:
Last updated: April 26, 2026

Welcome to EduDhruv ("we", "us", "our"), accessible at https://www.edudhruv.com. By accessing or using our website, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using our site.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing and using EduDhruv, you confirm that you are at least 13 years of age, have read and understood these Terms and Conditions, and agree to be legally bound by them. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our website.

2. Content and Copyright

All content published on EduDhruv — including but not limited to articles, guides, university reviews, scholarship information, blog posts, images, graphics, logos, and text — is the intellectual property of EduDhruv or its content providers and is protected by applicable copyright laws.

You may:

  • Read and share our content for personal, non-commercial use
  • Share links to our articles on social media or other platforms
  • Quote brief excerpts (under 50 words) with clear attribution and a link back to the original article

You may NOT:

  • Copy, reproduce, republish, or redistribute our content in full without prior written permission
  • Scrape, crawl, or extract our content using automated tools
  • Use our content for commercial purposes without a licensing agreement
  • Remove or alter any copyright notices or attributions

For content licensing or republication requests, contact us at edudruv@gmail.com.

3. AI-Generated Content Disclaimer

Some content on EduDhruv is assisted by artificial intelligence tools. While we strive for accuracy, AI-generated content may contain errors, outdated information, or inaccuracies. All content is published for informational purposes only.

We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of any information on this site. University fees, scholarship deadlines, visa requirements, and loan interest rates change frequently. Always verify critical information directly with the official institution, government body, or service provider before making any decisions.

3a. Editorial Personas and AI Counsellors

For organisational and branding purposes, EduDhruv attributes editorial guidance and counselling under a small number of named personas — including, without limitation, names such as "Priya Menon", "Rohan Iyer", "Ananya Kapoor" and other editorial bylines that appear across our articles, author pages, and chatbot interfaces.

These named personas are fictional editorial identities. They are not real, individual human counsellors. The published bios, photographs (where present), and any conversational interactions associated with these names are generated, curated, or assisted by artificial intelligence and our editorial systems, and represent the collective editorial perspective of the EduDhruv team.

Specifically, by using this website you acknowledge and agree that:

  • Author bylines and profile pages on EduDhruv represent editorial personas, not specific natural persons whose identity, credentials, or qualifications you may rely on individually.
  • Any "chat", "counsellor", or interactive guidance offered on this website (including but not limited to chatbots referred to by a person's name) is an AI-driven assistant and not a conversation with a licensed professional, certified counsellor, immigration lawyer, financial advisor, or any other regulated practitioner.
  • Responses, suggestions, recommendations or shortlists produced by these personas are informational only, are generated programmatically, and do not constitute legal, financial, immigration, tax, medical, or professional advice of any kind.
  • EduDhruv makes no representation that any persona referenced on this site is a real individual, holds any specific credential, qualification, registration, or licence, or has personally reviewed your particular circumstances.

You should always verify important information independently and consult a duly qualified, regulated professional before making any educational, financial, immigration, or career decision based on content or interactions on this website. EduDhruv accepts no liability for reliance placed on any persona-attributed content or AI-generated response.

4. Educational Information Disclaimer

The information provided on EduDhruv — including university guides, scholarship details, education loan reviews, student accommodation guides, and visa information — is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute professional advice.

We strongly recommend that you:

  • Verify all fees, deadlines, and requirements directly with the relevant university, scholarship body, or government authority
  • Consult a qualified education counsellor, immigration lawyer, or financial advisor before making major decisions
  • Check official government and institution websites for the most current and accurate information

EduDhruv accepts no liability for decisions made based on information found on this website.

5. Affiliate Links and Advertising Disclosure

EduDhruv participates in affiliate marketing programmes. Some links on our website are affiliate links, meaning we may earn a commission if you click through and make a purchase or sign up — at no additional cost to you.

We also display third-party advertisements through Google AdSense and other advertising networks. These advertisers may use cookies to serve ads based on your browsing history.

Our editorial content is not influenced by our affiliate relationships or advertisers. We only recommend products and services we believe provide genuine value to students.

6. Third-Party Links

Our website contains links to third-party websites including universities, scholarship portals, accommodation platforms, and government visa pages. These links are provided for your convenience only.

EduDhruv has no control over the content, privacy policies, or practices of third-party websites and accepts no responsibility for them. We encourage you to review the terms and privacy policies of any third-party site you visit.

7. Image Credits and Photography

Images used on EduDhruv are sourced from Unsplash under their free-to-use licence. Photographer credits are displayed where applicable. If you believe any image on our site infringes your copyright, please contact us immediately at edudruv@gmail.com and we will remove it promptly.

8. User Conduct

By using EduDhruv, you agree not to:

  • Post or transmit any unlawful, harmful, defamatory, or offensive content
  • Attempt to gain unauthorised access to our systems or servers
  • Use our website in any way that could damage, disable, or impair its operation
  • Collect or harvest personal data from our website
  • Impersonate any person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation
  • Use our website to distribute spam, malware, or unsolicited communications

9. Comments and User Submissions

If our website allows comments or user submissions, by submitting content you grant EduDhruv a non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to use, reproduce, and publish that content. You confirm that your submission does not infringe any third-party rights and is not defamatory, offensive, or unlawful.

We reserve the right to remove any comment or submission at our discretion without notice.

10. Disclaimer of Warranties

EduDhruv is provided on an "as is" and "as available" basis without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. We do not warrant that:

  • The website will be uninterrupted, error-free, or secure
  • Any information on the site is accurate, complete, or current
  • The site is free from viruses or harmful components

11. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, EduDhruv and its owners, employees, and partners shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising from:

  • Your use of or inability to use the website
  • Any errors or omissions in the content
  • Any decisions made based on information found on the website
  • Unauthorised access to or alteration of your data

12. Intellectual Property Infringement (DMCA)

EduDhruv respects intellectual property rights. If you believe that any content on our website infringes your copyright, please send a written notice to edudruv@gmail.com including:

  • Your name and contact information
  • A description of the copyrighted work you claim has been infringed
  • The URL where the allegedly infringing content appears
  • A statement that you have a good faith belief the use is unauthorised
  • Your electronic or physical signature

We will investigate all legitimate DMCA notices and remove infringing content promptly.

13. Privacy

Your use of EduDhruv is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms and Conditions by reference. Please review our Privacy Policy at https://www.edudhruv.com/privacy-policy/

14. Governing Law

These Terms and Conditions shall be governed by and construed in accordance with applicable laws. Any disputes arising from your use of EduDhruv shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts.

15. Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to modify these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated "Last updated" date. Your continued use of the website after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the new terms.

16. Contact Us

If you have any questions about these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:

Email: edudruv@gmail.com
Website: https://www.edudhruv.com
Contact page: https://www.edudhruv.com/contact-us/
